MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE GRYPHON SOLUTIONS, LLC'S Application For Order / Judgment For Sale Of Dwelling is off calendar. Case settled. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
